layout.grid: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 h-screen w-full overflow-hidden

Input.style: bg-slate-950/50 border-slate-800 text-white placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:border-pink-500/50 focus:ring-pink-500/20 h-12

variants.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-600 to-purple-600 hover:from-pink-500 hover:to-purple-500 text-white font-semibold h-12 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(236,72,153,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(236,72,153,0.5)] transition-all duration-300
variants.social: bg-white text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 font-medium h-12 rounded-full border border-slate-200

soul_orb.description: A glowing, floating gradient orb that represents the pet's soul/aura.
soul_orb.css_classes: absolute w-96 h-96 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-tr from-pink-500 to-purple-600 blur-[100px] opacity-20 animate-pulse-slow pointer-events-none

glassmorphism.description: Frosted glass effect for cards and overlays.

images.description: Soulful black dog portrait on dark background
images.placement: Left panel background or hero image

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is at least slate-400 on dark backgrounds. Important text must be white.
accessibility.labels: All inputs must have visible labels or aria-labels.

instructions_to_main_agent: Redesign /login page to match the 'Premium Dark' aesthetic.
Use a split-screen layout: Left side for emotional imagery (Soul Orb + Dog), Right side for the login form.
Implement the 'Soul Orb' visual: a large, blurred gradient circle floating behind the content to give a 'living' feel.
Use the provided image URL for the hero section.
Customize Shadcn components (Card, Input, Button) with the specified Tailwind classes to achieve the glassmorphism look.
Ensure the 'Continue with Google' button is prominent but distinct from the primary action.
Add micro-interactions: Inputs should glow slightly on focus; buttons should have a subtle lift and glow on hover.
Maintain all existing functionality: Email/Password login, Google auth, Forgot Password link, Create Account link.
Use 'Manrope' for headings and 'Inter' for body text.
Ensure mobile responsiveness: Stack the layout, with the image becoming a header or subtle background.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry where possible.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
